title: dryopteris angulata
intro: Dryopteris angulata, also known as the angled wood fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to East Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris angulata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine to develop new treatments for various conditions.
